bugs.class: off-by-one (skip(page * perPage) skips the first page; should be (page-1)*perPage)
regex-injection (user query compiled straight into RegExp → ReDoS / injection)
N+1 (Category.findById per result inside the loop)
off-by-one (slice(0, n + 1) returns n+1 suggestions instead of n)
null-deref (category can be null; category.title then throws)
